summary: NAS100 at 29,027 after -6% correction from ATH 30,808. D1 bearish: -DI(25.4) >> +DI(13.9), ADX 33, below 5/20-day MAs. Price in discount (31.6% of 28,206-30,808 range). Stochastics near oversold (25.8%). Alfred MT5 offline — no H4/M15 data. Bearish structure but deep discount limits downside. NO_GO — Layer 3 blind.

ict_analysis.daily_bias: BEARISH short-term / MACRO BULLISH. ADX(14)=33, -DI(25.4) >> +DI(13.9) = confirmed downtrend. Price below 5-day MA (29,009) and 20-day MA (29,681). From ATH 30,808 dropped -5.7%. RSI(14)=47 neutral. Stoch(14)=25.8% near oversold. Price at 31.6% of dealing range = DISCOUNT. Above 50-day MA (28,010) and 200-day MA (26,055) = macro bullish intact.
ict_analysis.h4_context: PROVISIONAL — Alfred MT5 offline. Bearish FVG at 29,172-29,599 overhead (from Walker Jun 10). Bearish OB at 29,612-29,673. BB at 29,700-29,823. All PD arrays above price = heavy resistance on any rally. Dealing range 28,206-30,808. Price in discount but corrective structure intact. Broken bullish FVG at 29,000-29,073 now inverted resistance.
ict_analysis.m15_status: NO VALID ENTRY — Alfred MT5 offline, no M15 OHLCV. Cannot confirm OB formation, Kill Zone timing, or CRT purge. Layer 3 completely blind. Per pipeline rules: if any layer fails = NO TRADE. Confidence reduced -15pts for missing data.

risks.event: Post-CPI volatility / Fed rate hike speculation
Alfred MT5 offline — no live H4/M15 data
Oversold bounce / short squeeze from discount

recommendation: NO_GO — Three reasons: (1) Alfred MT5 offline = Layer 2/3 blind, cannot complete ICT pipeline. (2) D1 bearish structure confirmed (-DI >> +DI, below MAs) but price in deep discount with stochastics near oversold = poor R:R for shorts. (3) Post-CPI volatility + Fed rate hike speculation creating unstable macro backdrop. Wait for: Alfred MT5 restoration, H4/M15 confirmation, and either (a) rally into 29,172-29,599 bearish FVG for short entry, or (b) hold 28,206 + reclaim 29,073 for bullish reversal.
